excerpt: A send-up of 1970s disaster pictures that sees a traumatized ex-fighter pilot struggle to land a jetliner full of critically ill passengers.
title: Airplane!

excerpt: An insurance salesman conspires with a married woman to kill her husband and collect on an accident policy.
title: Double Indemnity

excerpt: In old Arizona, former lawman Randolph Scott hunts the seven men responsible for his wife’s death and crosses paths with a couple heading to California.
title: 7 Men from Now

excerpt: A man suffering from amnesia tries to piece together his identity while questioning his sanity and investigating a possible murder.
title: Hysteria

excerpt: In a remote country house, a religious zealot confines her dead son’s fiancée to an attic prison.
title: Die! Die! My Darling!
